response:
c# can we somehow check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server, like ping but only one direction In your entire response, refrain from the use of any commas. In your response, the letter y should appear less than 18 times.
No direct c# method exists for this one way delay. You need client to send timestamp in packet. Server must reply with that time. Client then calculates difference. This needs two packets not one. True one way measurement needs clock sync.
